title: DRUG FREE DISTRICT CAMPAIGN LAUNCHED IN LAWNGTLAI
content:
15/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, 10th April 2026 :Today, the inaugural programme of the important “Drug Free District Campaign” under the Nasha Mukt Bharat Abhiyan was held at the DC Conference Hall. The programme was chaired by Shri Donny Lalruatsanga, Deputy Commissioner and Chairman of the Lawngtlai District Level Committee on Drug Free District. The campaign was officially launched by Shri C. Lalsawmzuala, Chief Executive Member (CEM), LADC.

Shri C. Lalsawmzuala expressed gratitude to the members of the District Level Committee and stated that the campaign was launched with the aim of making Lawngtlai District free from drug abuse and ensuring its successful implementation. He highlighted that since Lawngtlai is located along an international border, it is highly vulnerable to drug trafficking, making it essential to intensify efforts in combating drug abuse.He further stated that achieving a Drug-Free District would not be easy and would require strong cooperation and collective efforts from the government, Village Councils (VCs), NGOs, churches, and the general public. He urged everyone to work together with full commitment.

The CEM emphasized the need for careful and innovative approaches in tackling drug abuse. While acknowledging the continuous efforts made by the government, NGOs, and churches in rehabilitating drug users, he stressed that sustained dedication and perseverance are crucial. He reiterated that LADC will continue to contribute actively and called upon all stakeholders, including VCs, NGOs, churches, MJA, and the public, to take an active role in the fight against drugs.

Shri Donny Lalruatsanga highlighted that, alongside the initiatives of the Mizoram Government, this campaign is also a significant initiative of the Central Government. He mentioned that various important committees have been formed under this programme and that funds have been allocated by the Central Government to support anti-drug initiatives. He affirmed that all efforts will be made to transform Lawngtlai District into a Drug-Free District.

He also stressed that combating drug abuse requires collective action, noting that the efforts of Police, Excise, and NGOs alone are not sufficient. He called upon all citizens of Lawngtlai to actively participate in the fight against drugs.

Shri PC Lalchunglura, Superintendent of Police, in his speech appreciated the leadership of the Deputy Commissioner and emphasized that every individual has a significant responsibility in achieving a Drug-Free District or Village. He highlighted the importance of continued cooperation and collective effort in combating drug abuse.

Smt. Malsawmtluangi, Superintendent of DC Office, delivered a PowerPoint presentation explaining that the Drug Free Campaign, under the Nasha Mukt Bharat Abhiyan, aims to eliminate drug abuse and trafficking in Lawngtlai District. The campaign will cover 187 villages—99 under LADC and 88 under CADC. It is planned for a duration of three years and may be extended if necessary.Committees will be formed at the District, Block, and Village levels to carry out the campaign effectively within their respective jurisdictions. Villages declared as Drug-Free, with the approval of the District Administration, will be awarded Certificates of Recognition and Citations on every Independence Day.

The programme witnessed full participation from members of the Lawngtlai District Level Committee on Drug Free District. The event concluded with a vote of thanks delivered by Shri  Jammy Vanhmingliana, Sub Deputy Commissioner.

title: LAWNGTLAIAH 'DRUG FREE DISTRICT CAMPAIGN' HAWNNA NEI
content:
107/2025-2026

Lawngtlai,10th April 2026 :Vawiin khan Nasha Mukt Bharat Abhiyan-hnuaia Ruihhlo umbo tura beihpui thlakna pawimawh tak ' Drug Free District Campaign' hawnna inkhawm chu DC Conference Hall-ah neih a ni a. Pu Donny Lalruatsanga bawrhsap leh Chairman, Lawngtlai District Level Committee on Drug Free District - nibawk chuan kaihruaiin, Pu C. Lalsawmzuala, Chief Executive Member (CEM) LADC chuan campaign hawnna hi a nei.

Pu C. Lalsawmzuala chuan District Level Committee on Drug Free District Member-kalkhawmte hnena lawmthu sawina neiin, Lawngtlai District - ruihhloa a lo fihlim theih nan leh hlawhtling taka kalpui tura 'Drug Free Campaign' lawm a hawn thu a sawi a. Lawngtlai District - chu International Border- a awm a nih angin, Ruihhlo lo luh theihna a tam hle a, hemi a nih avang hian ruihhlo do kawngah pawh chak leh uar zawka hnathawh a tul takzet a ni, a ti. Ruihhlo awmlohna District - a puan chu thil awlsam a ni dawn lo a, sawrkar, VC, NGO, Kohhran leh mipuite tan tlan leh thawhho a ngai dawn hle a, theihtawp chhuahin i thawkho ang u tiin a sawm a ni.

CEM chuan Ruihhlo do kawngah fimkhur taka hmalak a tul hle a, ngaihtuahna thar nen ke pen a pawimawh tak zet a ni, a ti. Ruihhlo zuartu leh Ruihhlo bawiha tang mekte chhanchhuak turin sawrkar, NGO leh Kohhran ten theihtawp lo chhuah tawh thin mahse tha thlah theih a ni lo tih hriaa, thahnem ngai taka thawh zel chu thil pawimawh hmasa a ni, a ti a. Ruihhlo do kawngah LADC pawhin theihtawp a chhuah thin thu tarlangin, tha thlah loa hmalak zel a nih tur thu a tarlang a. Pu C. Lalsawmzuala chuan tanrual hi chakna a ni tiin, Ruihhlo do kawngah LADC leh District Administration - ten theihtawp an chhuah tlan zel tur thu tarlangin, VC, NGO, Kohhran, MJA leh mipuite tihtakzeta ruihhlo do pui turin a sawm nghal a ni.

Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan Mizoram sawrkar hmalakna liah lamah Central Sawrkar hmalakna pawimawh tak a ni a, hemi hnuaiah hian committe peng hrang leh pawimawh tak tak a awm a ni, a ti. Central Sawrkar atanga sum leh pai lokal, Ruihhlo tirem tura hmalakna a nih angin Lawngtlai District chu ruihhlo awmlohna ' Drug Free District' a siam tura theihtawp chhuah a nih tur thu a tarlang a. Ruihhlo do kawngah sawrkar Department ,VC,NGO, Kohhran leh mipuite tha taka thawkho turin duhsakna a hlan a. Ruihhlo leh a kaihhnawihin ram leh hnam a tichhiat nasat zia tarlangin, a do kawngah tha thlah theih a ni lo a, Police, Excise leh NGO - te hmalakna ringawt a tawk lo tiin, mitinin beihpui thlak ngai thil a ni tiin, Bawrhsap chuan theihtawp chhuaha Ruihhlo do turin kalkhawmte leh Lawngtlai mipuite a sawm nghal bawk.

Pu PC Lalchunglura, Superintendent of Police chuan thutawi sawina neiin, Bawrhsap hmalakna fakawm a tih thu a sawi a. Drug Free District/ Village - ni turin mitinin mawhphurhna lian tak an nei tih tarlangin, thawhhona tha a awm zel a pawimawh tak zet a ti a. Ruihhlo do leh tihrem kawngah theihtawp chhuah lo nitawh thin mahse tha thlah lo a, thawhhona tha tak nena ruihho do zel a pawimawh tak zet tiin, thawhpuiah Lawngtlai District mipuite a sawm a ni.

Pi Malsawmtluangi, Superintendent, DC Office chuan Power Point Presentation - pekna a nei a. Drug Free Campaign - chu 'Nasha Mukt Bharat Abhiyan' hnuaia kalpui tur niin, Lawngtlai District - chu ruihhlo hmansual leh tawlhruk awmlohnaa siam a ni, a ti a. LADC huamchhunga khua - 99, CADC huamchhunga khua - 88, avaiin Lawngtlai District chhunga khua - 187 ah kalpui a ni ang. Drug Free Campaign- hi kum thum chhung atan kalpui tura duan niin, a tul anga pawhsei theih a ni ang a ti. District Level, Block Level leh Village Level - ah te Committe din tur niin, mahni thuneihna zawn theuhah hmalak tur a ni dawn a ni. District Administration hriatpuia Drug Free Vilalge - a puante chu Independence Day apiangin Certificate of Recognition leh Citation - hlan an ni ang a ti.

Vawiin hun hmannaah hian ' Lawngtlai District Level Committee on Drug Free District' Member- te an telkim tha hle a, Pu Jammy Vanhmingliana, SDC, chuan lawmthu sawina neiin hun a khar.
